step_rationale: CAD susceptibility gene; stress-response pathway; mechanism in MI unclear, placed off-pathway.
mechanism: HSF2BP variants associate with CAD susceptibility through poorly characterized stress-response or regulatory mechanisms not directly on the atherothrombotic cascade.

references.title: Exploring the dark genome: implications for precision medicine.
references.journal: Mammalian genome : official journal of the International Mammalian Genome Society
